subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-20
subcodes.first_line: I shall never forget you. You are always in my mind... If you sacrifice yourself for the rich, they think you do it because you are obliged
subcodes.first_line_orig: من ابداً شما ها را فراموش نمیکنم همیشه در یاد و خاطر من هستید بجمیع یاران مهربانی ابلاغ دارید
subcodes.subjects: @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @service to others; to the Cause of God
